## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --locked`
- [ ] `scripts/launch-check.sh` when install/fetch/exec/release behavior changes
